context.summary: Added jazz_theory ChromaDB collection (17 chunks from 5 seed docs) and /admin/reingest endpoint with Cloud Scheduler for weekly portfolio re-ingestion.
risk_areas: Jazz theory auto-ingestion on startup adds latency to cold start
Cross-collection search now includes jazz_theory — could affect unrelated queries

tests.title: Health shows jazz_theory collection
tests.expected: Response includes 'jazz_theory' key in collections object with chunk count > 0.

tests.title: ii-V-I query returns relevant chunks
tests.expected: Top result is from ii_V_I_progressions.md with score > 0.4.

tests.title: Jobim query returns jobim_harmony chunks
tests.expected: Results are from jobim_harmony.md. Top result mentions Jobim.

tests.title: Altered scale query returns modes content
tests.expected: Top result is 'Altered Scale (Super Locrian)' from modes_and_scales.md.

tests.title: Autumn Leaves query returns standards content
tests.expected: Top result mentions Autumn Leaves from common_jazz_standards.md.

tests.title: Tritone substitution query
tests.expected: Top result is from chord_substitutions.md describing tritone sub.

tests.title: Reingest with wrong token returns 403
tests.description: POST to /admin/reingest?collection=portfolio with X-Reingest-Token: wrong-token and Content-Length: 0.

tests.title: Reingest with correct token returns 200
tests.description: POST to /admin/reingest?collection=portfolio with correct X-Reingest-Token and Content-Length: 0.

tests.title: Reingest with invalid collection returns 400
tests.description: POST to /admin/reingest?collection=bogus with correct token and Content-Length: 0.

tests.title: Portfolio collection still works
tests.expected: Returns portfolio results with scores. Collection count unchanged (~556).

tests.title: Etymology collection still works
tests.expected: Returns etymology results from Beekes PDF. Collection count unchanged (~1835).

tests.title: Code collection still works
tests.expected: Returns code results with repo/filepath metadata. Collection count unchanged (~521).

test_data_notes: All tests can be run via browser or curl against the production URL. No setup required.
cc_observations: Jazz theory chunks are small (17 total) since seed docs are short. The chunk_markdown function skips sections under 100 chars, so some H2 sections were grouped. Cloud Scheduler job runs Sunday 3am CT — first execution is 2026-03-15.
